scripts.dev:worker: uv run --project backend celery -A app.tasks.celery_app:celery_app worker --loglevel=INFO
scripts.lint: pnpm --dir frontend lint && uv run --project backend ruff check backend/app backend/tests
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --dir frontend typecheck && uv run --project backend mypy backend/app
scripts.test: pnpm --dir frontend test && uv run --project backend pytest
scripts.db:upgrade: uv run --project backend alembic -c backend/alembic.ini upgrade head
scripts.db:downgrade: uv run --project backend alembic -c backend/alembic.ini downgrade base
